option.name: originalContent
option.value:
class InferenceConfig: TARGET_SIZE = (224, 224) MIN_CROP_SIZE = (140, 140) CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD = 0.25 PADDING_PIXELS = 20
NUM_CLASSES = 2 X3D_VERSION = "m" NUM_FRAMES = 16 TEMPORAL_STRIDE = 2 CROP_SIZE = 224
KINETICS_MEAN = [0.45, 0.45, 0.45] KINETICS_STD = [0.225, 0.225, 0.225]
DEVICE = "cuda"

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
class InferenceConfig: TARGET_SIZE = (112, 112) MIN_CROP_SIZE = (112, 112) CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD = 0.25 PADDING_PIXELS = 20
NUM_CLASSES = 2 X3D_VERSION = "m" NUM_FRAMES = 16 TEMPORAL_STRIDE = 1 CROP_SIZE = 112
KINETICS_MEAN = [0.43216, 0.394666, 0.37645] KINETICS_STD = [0.22803, 0.22145, 0.216989]
DEVICE = "cuda"
